query:
-- Check the service S1315
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.customerExternalId,
       c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1315';

-- Check all billing items for this customer
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.contactName, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = (SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1315')
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Check what services are assigned to those billing items
SELECT sba.serviceExternalId, sba.billingItemExternalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.provider
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId IN (
  SELECT bi.externalId FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.customerExternalId = (SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1315')
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Check the service S1315
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.customerExternalId,
       c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1315';

-- Check all billing items for this customer
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.contactName, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = (SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1315')
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Check what services are assigned to those billing items
SELECT sba.serviceExternalId, sba.billingItemExternalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.provider
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId IN (
  SELECT bi.externalId FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.customerExternalId = (SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1315')
);
